rationale: The only linkage provided is a single DOI-matched reference, with no in-text citation context or reference text to show how it is used. While both papers model event timing with censored outcomes, the cited paper’s core constructs (intention uncertainty and salesperson quitting thresholds) are not reflected in the citing paper’s stated focal constructs or contributions. This makes the pair not safely droppable but also not clearly substantive from current evidence.
